SCADA Standards Appendix A 
HFC AWTP Master Plan 
Howard F. Curren AWTP 
SCADA Standards Appendix A ­
Definitions and General Reference 
January 2025 
127
artifact_summary: This artifact is a screenshot of a SCADA system interface displaying the configuration settings for a specific knife gate valve. It captures parameter definitions for limit switches and operational timers used in the HFC AWTP Master Plan.
artifact_blurb: This screenshot displays a SCADA interface configuration for Knife Gate No.1, identified by the tag H-010-KV047-101-01. The interface includes options to configure limit switches and sets specific timing parameters, such as a 20.0-second pulse out timer and a 35.0-second full stall timer. This visual reference is part of the SCADA Standards Appendix A within the HFC AWTP Master Plan documentation.
